name: Tushar Dabhade
subtitle: Final-year Computer Engineering student focused on AI-enabled full-stack applications, IoT systems, and production environments.
about: Final-year Computer Engineering student with a strong foundation in Full Stack Development and IoT systems.

I am currently pursuing my B.E. at Dr. D. Y. Patil Institute of Technology (CGPA: 8.21/10). My work experience includes a .NET Full Stack Development internship at Cognizant focused on IoT device monitoring, as well as a frontend development stint at Octanet Services.

Beyond development, I have solved 150+ LeetCode problems across various data structures and algorithms, and I hold certifications in Java Full Stack, React.js, and HTML/CSS. I thrive in building AI-enabled applications and production-ready systems.
